TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Carlos_Arroyo, title = Carlos_Arroyo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carlos_Arroyo} }

S.FORM: Carlos Arroyo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Carlos Arroyo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Carlos Arroyo mrkyas ru hagan beh sa Fajard,Puerto Rico. 2001 kawas tmosaq mqwas biru sangka' NBA. hiya ga ru Alberto tnaq htagan nha. Carlos Arroyo tmasoq mqwas biru maki Fajardo,Colegio Santiago Apostol. 1998-2001 kawas mqwas beh(FIU) hopa pqwasan biru. mopuw pitu kawas lga(17),Carlos Arroyo t'aring qnxan na pincwagan maki Puerto Rico. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Carlos Arroyo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Carlos Arroyo, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Carlos Arroyo mrkyas ru hagan beh sa Fajard,Puerto Rico. 2001 kawas tmosaq mqwas biru sangka' NBA. hiya ga ru Alberto tnaq htagan nha. Carlos Arroyo tmasoq mqwas biru maki Fajardo,Colegio Santiago Apostol. 1998-2001 kawas mqwas beh(FIU) hopa pqwasan biru. mopuw pitu kawas lga(17),Carlos Arroyo t'aring qnxan na pincwagan maki Puerto Rico. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ρßija …Θa ru alΈ≤erto tnaq Ρßta…Θan nΡßa. Π~ ®arlos~…ï arrojo tmas~…ïoq mqwas~…ï Έ≤iru maki *ajar*o, Π~ ®ole…Θio s~…ïantia…Θo apos~…ïtol. ****-**** kawas~…ï mqwas~…ï Έ≤eΡß(*iu) Ρßopa pqwas~…ïan Έ≤iru. mopuw pitu kawas~…ï l…Θa(**), Π~ ®arlos~…ï arrojo t îari≈΄ qnxan na pin Π~ ®wa…Θan maki puerto ri Π~ ®o. kinΈ≤lajqan pin Π~ ®juwa…Θan s~…ïa qnxan nija î ps~…ïp≈΄an mari s~…ïa maj ju…Θal ja Π~ ®i≈΄ mas~…ïuq ms~…ïpu≈΄ mari s~…ïa ps~…ïp≈΄an mari na maj Π~ ®ju…Θal Έ≤ja Π~ ®i≈΄ l…Θa Π~ ®inkΡßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Έ≤rΈ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Έ≤as~…ïketΈ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo Π~ ®iation plajers~…ï
